testcase.name: test_connection_error_handle
test_error_handle_get_user_profile
test_error_handle_upload_image_url
test_error_with_detail_handle
test_send_text
test_persistent_menu
test_persistent_menu_with_None
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_persistent_menu.TestNaverTalkAPI testMethod=test_persistent_menu_with_None>
@responses.activate def test_persistent_menu_with_None(self): responses.add( responses.POST, NaverTalkApi.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ "success": True, "resultCode": "00" }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() def test_callback(res, payload): self.assertEqual( payload, { "event": "persistentMenu", "menuContent": [] } ) counter()
> self.tested.persistent_menu(callback=test_callback)
tests/api/test_persistent_menu.py:133: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nta/api.py:281: in persistent_menu self._send(payload, callback=callback) nta/api.py:172: in _send self.__error_check(res) nta/api.py:396: in __error_check raise NaverTalkApiError(response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <[AttributeError("'NaverTalkApiError' object has no attribute 'message'") raised in repr()] NaverTalkApiError object at 0x111da40c0> api_response = {"resultCode": "01", "resultMessage": "\ub9cc\ub8cc\ub418\uc5c8\uac70\ub098 \uc798\ubabb\ub41c Authorization", "success": false}
def __init__(self, api_response): """__init__ method.
Args: - api_response: Response class object """ > super(NaverTalkApiError, self).__init__(api_response.data.decode('utf-8')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NaverTalkResponse' object has no attribute 'data'
nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_request_profile
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_request_profile.TestNaverTalkAPI testMethod=test_request_profile>
@responses.activate def test_request_profile(self): responses.add( responses.POST, NaverTalkApi.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ "success": True, "resultCode": "00" }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() def test_callback(res, payload): self.assertEqual(res.result_code, "00") self.assertEqual(res.success, True) self.assertEqual( payload.options, { "field": "nickname", "agreements": ["cellphone", "address"] } ) counter()
> self.tested.request_profile( 'test_id', 'nickname', agreements=['cellphone', 'address'], callback=test_callback )
tests/api/test_request_profile.py:44: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nta/api.py:195: in request_profile self._send(payload, callback=callback) nta/api.py:172: in _send self.__error_check(res) nta/api.py:396: in __error_check raise NaverTalkApiError(response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <[AttributeError("'NaverTalkApiError' object has no attribute 'message'") raised in repr()] NaverTalkApiError object at 0x111da43d0> api_response = {"resultCode": "99", "resultMessage": "\uc798\ubabb\ub41c user \uac12 : test_id", "success": false}
def __init__(self, api_response): """__init__ method.
Args: - api_response: Response class object """ > super(NaverTalkApiError, self).__init__(api_response.data.decode('utf-8')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NaverTalkResponse' object has no attribute 'data'
nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_composite_with_calendar
test_send_composite
test_send_composite_with_quick_reply
test_send_image
test_send_image_with_quick_reply
test_send_text
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_send_text.TestNaverTalkAPI testMethod=test_send_text>
@responses.activate def test_send_text(self): responses.add( responses.POST, NaverTalkApi.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ "success": True, "resultCode": "00" }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() def test_callback(res, payload): self.assertEqual(res.result_code, "00") self.assertEqual(res.success, True) self.assertEqual( payload, { 'event': 'send', 'user': 'test_user_id', 'textContent': { 'text': 'test_str_message', 'code': None, 'inputType': None }, 'options': { 'notification': False, 'readBySend': False } } ) counter()
> self.tested.send( 'test_user_id', 'test_str_message', callback=test_callback )
tests/api/test_send_text.py:57: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nta/api.py:157: in send self._send(payload, callback=callback) nta/api.py:172: in _send self.__error_check(res) nta/api.py:396: in __error_check raise NaverTalkApiError(response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <[AttributeError("'NaverTalkApiError' object has no attribute 'message'") raised in repr()] NaverTalkApiError object at 0x111f5c600> api_response = {"resultCode": "99", "resultMessage": "\uc798\ubabb\ub41c user \uac12 : test_user_id", "success": false}
def __init__(self, api_response): """__init__ method.
Args: - api_response: Response class object """ > super(NaverTalkApiError, self).__init__(api_response.data.decode('utf-8')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NaverTalkResponse' object has no attribute 'data'
nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_send_with_quick_reply
test_thread_passing
test_thread_taking
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_thread.TestNaverTalkAPI testMethod=test_thread_taking>
@responses.activate def test_thread_taking(self): responses.add( responses.POST, NaverTalkApi.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ "success": True, "resultCode": "00" }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() def test_callback(res, payload): self.assertEqual(res.result_code, "00") self.assertEqual(res.success, True) self.assertEqual( payload, { 'event': 'handover', 'user': 'test_user_id', 'options': { "control": "takeThread", "metadata": "" } } ) counter()
> self.tested.take_thread( user_id='test_user_id', callback=test_callback )

Args: - api_response: Response class object """ > super(NaverTalkApiError, self).__init__(api_response.data.decode('utf-8')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NaverTalkResponse' object has no attribute 'data'
nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_typing_off
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_typing_action.TestNaverTalkActionEvent testMethod=test_typing_off>
@responses.activate def test_typing_off(self): responses.add( responses.POST, NaverTalkApi.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ "success": True, "resultCode": "00", }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() def test_callback(res, payload): self.assertEqual(res.result_code, "00") self.assertEqual(res.success, True) self.assertEqual(payload.user, 'test_user_id') self.assertEqual(payload.event, 'action') self.assertEqual(payload.options, {"action": "typingOff"}) counter()
> self.tested.typing_off('test_user_id', callback=test_callback)
tests/api/test_typing_action.py:64: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nta/api.py:270: in typing_off self._send(payload, callback=callback) nta/api.py:172: in _send self.__error_check(res) nta/api.py:396: in __error_check raise NaverTalkApiError(response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <[AttributeError("'NaverTalkApiError' object has no attribute 'message'") raised in repr()] NaverTalkApiError object at 0x111f5e6d0> api_response = {"resultCode": "99", "resultMessage": "\uc798\ubabb\ub41c user \uac12 : test_user_id", "success": false}

Args: - api_response: Response class object """ > super(NaverTalkApiError, self).__init__(api_response.data.decode('utf-8')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NaverTalkResponse' object has no attribute 'data'
nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_typing_on
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_typing_action.TestNaverTalkActionEvent testMethod=test_typing_on>
@responses.activate def test_typing_on(self): responses.add( responses.POST, NaverTalkApi.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ "success": True, "resultCode": "00", }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() def test_callback(res, payload): self.assertEqual(res.result_code, "00") self.assertEqual(res.success, True) self.assertEqual(payload.user, 'test_user_id') self.assertEqual(payload.event, 'action') self.assertEqual(payload.options, {"action": "typingOn"}) counter()
> self.tested.typing_on('test_user_id', callback=test_callback)

nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_upload_image
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_upload_image.TestNaverTalkAPI testMethod=test_upload_image>
@responses.activate def test_upload_image(self): responses.add( responses.POST, NaverTalkApi.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ "success": True, "resultCode": "00", "imageId": "test-1234-image-id" }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() def test_callback(res, payload): self.assertEqual(res.result_code, "00") self.assertEqual(res.success, True) self.assertEqual(res.image_id, "test-1234-image-id") counter()
> self.tested.upload_image( 'test_image_url.jpg', callback=test_callback )
tests/api/test_upload_image.py:39: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nta/api.py:210: in upload_image self._send(payload, callback=callback, response_form=NaverTalkImageResponse) nta/api.py:172: in _send self.__error_check(res) nta/api.py:396: in __error_check raise NaverTalkApiError(response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <[AttributeError("'NaverTalkApiError' object has no attribute 'message'") raised in repr()] NaverTalkApiError object at 0x111f90910> api_response = {"imageId": null, "resultCode": "02", "resultMessage": "user \ub204\ub77d \uc624\ub958", "success": false}

Args: - api_response: Response class object """ > super(NaverTalkApiError, self).__init__(api_response.data.decode('utf-8')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NaverTalkImageResponse' object has no attribute 'data'
nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_after_send
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.api.test_webhook_handler.TestNaverTalkApi testMethod=test_after_send>
@responses.activate def test_after_send(self): responses.add( responses.POST, self.tested.DEFAULT_API_ENDPOINT, json={ 'success': True, 'resultCode': '00' }, status=200 )
counter = mock.MagicMock() @self.tested.after_send def after_send_handler(res, payload): self.assertTrue(isinstance(res, NaverTalkResponse)) self.assertTrue(isinstance(payload, GenericPayload)) counter()
> self.tested.send('test_user_id', 'test_text')
tests/api/test_webhook_handler.py:320: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nta/api.py:157: in send self._send(payload, callback=callback) nta/api.py:172: in _send self.__error_check(res) nta/api.py:396: in __error_check raise NaverTalkApiError(response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <[AttributeError("'NaverTalkApiError' object has no attribute 'message'") raised in repr()] NaverTalkApiError object at 0x111f90280> api_response = {"resultCode": "99", "resultMessage": "\uc798\ubabb\ub41c user \uac12 : test_user_id", "success": false}

Args: - api_response: Response class object """ > super(NaverTalkApiError, self).__init__(api_response.data.decode('utf-8')) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'NaverTalkResponse' object has no attribute 'data'
nta/exceptions.py:42: AttributeError
